name: linkedin-ad-asset-factory
description: Codex-only setup and workflow for B2B LinkedIn ad asset factories.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run auditable LinkedIn ad workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-only plugin that installs its local marketplace entry, walks through OpenAI API key setup without collecting secrets, and operates an approval-gated B2B LinkedIn ad asset factory.
defaultPrompt: Run the LinkedIn Ad Asset Factory initial setup walkthrough.
Prepare a dry-run for this B2B LinkedIn campaign.
Review and revise one approved LinkedIn ad asset.
